### Lahelada — 2016-04-10T17:28:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-192467>

@[caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) I think you will love this.

I had originally planned to go out into the country a bit but decided in the end that I need some music. Quite by accident I came across this. It made my day ,made my week. The tenor I am about to post is probably one of Argentina's finest but had retired from singing or better retired to smaller stages as tenors are wont to do. I saw him in his prime and I was bowled over. The performance I am posting would be a credit to a 40 year old but the tenor singing near 70.
I came across this and understood it totally from what we are doing here to what happened there musically. If you decide to watch it watch everything, the eyebrow of the violinist when the aria reaches a seminal point, ,the women in the audience and the standing ovation later, especially the men.
I was laughing with happiness to see the man realising his dream to be back on THE stage in his hometown,a new stage that has supposedly the best accoustics and is world class. I cried when I got to the end. Watch it even if you do not like opera.

Taking a day for me today ,no reading. I read what Dr K said in another thread ,basically understood it and will act on it. But today I will just revel in being able to feel young again. Have a great Sunday all.

### Lahelada — 2016-04-11T13:46:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-192497>

Thank you thank you thank you,Caroline. I tried to skype you but if you get off the computer at 5pm we have almost no common time . One day we will again.

This week is going to be somewhat interesting with a lot of new life constellations, one completely surprising one out of left field so the shot in the arm does me good. It was the point of the music day ,too . Going to the country would have been good if the sun had been out but it was overcast and later rained. Went into the garden instead and refilled on music.

I wanted to make an addendum to the video. I was present at an opera in London where the tenor "failed" badly just on that very end note of Nessun dorma. I expected the worst that there would be booing etc. The guy on stage was ready to burst into tears it was visible to everyone. And then without a prompt the audience stood up simultaneously, no waiting what everyone else would do and gave the guy a 5 minute standing ovation. When we let ourselves feel things amazing things can happen. German speakers think about the words "fuehlen" und "spueren". They are not exact synonyms. One is more powerful than the other .

Now the English do not even clap normally during a performance so as not to disturb the flow of it. And that got me thinking about a favorite of Dr K
"You can come into my door ,go out my door but you cannot stand in the doorway" People who are of the same frequency as you or near enrich your life,others steal." If you do not want those others to leave ( doubtful decision) then you had bettter make yourself strong and depending where you are you on your journey may not have the extra to support that decision ,even if you think you do. I had to dump the bosses finally before I could move on.

Phrase for the week: **"Don't put your glow on low"** Borrowed from Sean Stephenson

### Lahelada — 2016-04-13T14:18:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-192623>

I am skipping ! Got a very nice thank you for it yesterday,too. The immense offer of help that ensued was even more touching.The unfortunate thing is that the thank you has made me aware of further changes that need to be made. That door had better be wide.
I was thinking about the doctor thing still. I can't get it out of my head. I am more that ever convinced that I would not survive the residence. Talked to a doc the other day about the ins and outs and basically all said and done not even allowing for false starts it is ten years. Now I am planning to be alive for that long and a lot longer but it is not it. A bitter sweet goodbye but the idea is a bit like a hiccup. Just when you think it is gone it comes back. But every time it comes back it leaves a grain to build something new with.

In other news I FINALLY bought the black light. Another useless procrastination on my part. So what if I hadn'tt really needed it medically speaking could I not just have settled for some wacky lighting? Some things are just open and shut not half open, or maybe the wind opened it and it should not be open.
It is raining again, British times here but it gave me the final push to buy it.

I am intrigued by the link Dr K left . I will check it out now. Still chewing on the last clue. A bulb came on with regards to my mother's life and that I had not been wrong to suspect that because I resembled her that I was in a bad way. Not finding my own pulse as a trained first aider should also have been given more prominence. That is why I did not answer the question about what I did with MB. I mentioned that it maybe did a number on my heart ,that the kickstart to my system was pretty drastic, (juicy heart palps) I have also not mentioned the ammonia smell on this forum and I should have as it is a pivotal element of the whole picture. It is now almost gone after MB and nicotine.

Nicotine is a godsend . I cycle between one in the morning or on heavy days up to 4 x 2mg gums. Not feeling signs of addiction though ,the must have my nic gum in the morning so coming from a family of alcoholics that is pretty astounding.

Heteroplasmy o heteroplasmy what is thy number!

### Lahelada — 2016-04-13T14:37:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-192624>

New thoughts about the ex bosses. I left thinking that with my arse I would not need to look at them. A crude saying in German that means that you do not have any reason to look at someone ever again. But to be stuck in the same groove about a past situation says more about your own brain than someone else's . I do know that my boss was sad when I left that went beyond logistics of replacing me. He even ventured that in other circumstances I should not have had a need to accept the kind of job that he had offered (talking about low pay)
I met my ex colleague in the street the other day and of course I could not refrain from asking what happened after I left. Apparently they turned over a new leaf. The chicanery seems to have all but stopped. I asked about the bosses health and he told me no better no worse. last I heard he was on Cox 1 Cox2 inhibitors.
I must say it needled my heart . I liked the guy understood his "problems" but should never have suffered them . There have been good times,the English humor banter, semi insults that you can only weigh when you have lived there for a while which the bossesse had not and she definitely did not like that I could elicit a grudging laughter in the morning from the boss. My "clinical symptoms" are almost identical to the boss so maybe when I am better I will have to pop in and say hello...
My history of light story I cobbled up in the kitchen between serving breakfast ,about missing light frequencies that blue was so penetrating that she could not stand the to have the CFL lights in her office hit home with the bossesse,though. About two weeks later a kinesiologist type infrared lamp appeared in her office.. In the end we all suffered from backache in the same region on the same side. Of course it was given the usual excuses,too much bending,too much sitting etc, weight you name it ... Time 14...

### Lahelada — 2016-05-20T20:24:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-195137>

Back for a little musing and update.
First a musing about my forum name .It was meant as a joke the cold one due to my high cold resistance, but it also means the frozen one , the scared one even if you will. Unconscious choice? Well , the ice has melted and the puddles of water are reforming. Be like water says Bruce Lee. Do I have 5 phases ? I will try and find out.

Having a great time living although that does not mean all is roses but I always find something to sing about or dance to.
Concrete wins:
\- mobility is returning . I can walk on tip toe without pain, bend at every angle and the tightness in my left leg is gone. Back is almost normal. I even managed some gymnastics this morning upstairs on the terrace. Feeling a need to move every which way I can. I seldom stand still these days. Equilibrium is good even in wild dance routines which I now indulge in frequently.

Some time back I reported that I had trouble tapping out a rhythm with my left foot. Happy to say that this is much better now.
I took a little break from MB. After a while I had migraines which I do not normally suffer from. Prolactin inhibition? Not giving it up though ,it has done me too much good. Just recalibrating .

I am also doing a little experiment with singing ,how easy it is to hold a tune and project my voice. It differs from day to day currently. The song I picked as a benchmark is Beautiful Dreamer by Stephen Foster. Always wanted to be able to justice to that song. My voice had gotten very small in the past months .

I am also magically drawn to drums. I want one ! I listen to drums , Kodo drummers for example.

Still many stones unturned, one burning need , and a lot of humility surfacing.

Another win for today - I can run again ,I mean with proper lift and without being too breathless.I had days when I could run but felt that I was going to topple over as if my command to run would not reach the feet.

Yup nic gum two . Using it ad hoc. Yesterday I used 3x 2mg gums ,the first around 9 and the second at 2 pm ish.
Yesterday's menu was not good. I was on the go and after breakfast which was 5 ozs of too salty pork loin I went to a buffet to get some egg dishes for lunch. The supposed vegetarian egg dishes all had squash so after chucking that out they were still too sweet and too little food. I extended my eating window to 4pm to be able to try the new 100 % chocolate just out but not even an ounce. Total fasting hours yesterday : 15 hours

Today so far 6 eggs with 2 ozs salami and coffee. Frontloading today as I will be out all day and do not want to hunt outside looking at the clock. No MB today so far. I ran out..

### Lahelada — 2016-05-29T16:11:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-195577>

Euphorically pensive this Sunday morning. I really do not want to share this as someone might think me silly but that would just be carrying on with the same old crap. So here goes
For some reason this song popped into my head this morning .
"Lets go fly a kite" from the Mary Poppins movie
At the beginning of the song I only felt that the lyrics are the embodiment of the FB post I so wildly "love" every time they appear which say "Live with euphoria"

"With tuppence for paper and string
You can have your own set of wings
With your feet on the ground you're a bird in flight
With your fist holding tight to the string of your kite"

Read more: [Julie Andrews & Dick Van Dyke - Lets Go Fly A Kite Lyrics | MetroLyrics"](http://www.metrolyrics.com/lets-go-fly-a-kite-lyrics-julie-andrews-dick-van-dyke.html#ixzz4A2b5f0p8)

But then something else that is recently on my mind and the product of all the discussion on page 53 of this journal crept into this too.

While conscious that this is my projection only , and that is the job of a good piece of art to be the lie that reveals the truth, I saw something else in the face of Mary Poppins that I had not expected : CPC 11 ..after all she is the nanny/teacher to the children and the faces of two very good friends , my face and that of a lot of strangers who without knowing became my teachers. Watch 1:23 . Watch the expression . That is the face of anyone who has managed to make a difference to someone's life and they skip down the road into their new life without looking back. Don't take it for granted. Look back, smile and say thanks even if you expect a gruff response. One's thanks makes a difference and comes back to your recipient as a gift when times are not so rosy and quite frankly hard. One might even try and say thanks even when one is not sure if one has been given something of value. Some things only show their value later on in the process. I have been given all these gifts.

Thanks @[Albert83BCN](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/5984/) for accidentally pointing me in a direction I had never gone and entering a world I never would have seen. Now that sounds cryptic haha. It was actually a joke he posted with no intent but in true quantum fashion it sent me scurrying down another rabbit hole and I have not surfaced yet again.
Thanks @[caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) for the enlightening,caring conversations.
Thanks @[Scompy](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/17718/) for inspiring my new fasting regime.
Thanks to all my students for teaching me.
Thanks to everyone who helped me through the tribulations on page 53 and made me see a bigger picture
Thanks s to someone who sent me "light in shaping life" which is now languishing in customs
Thanks to two good friends who pull me up on my mistakes or make me realise them while talking about something seemingly unconnected.
And as always my biggest thanks to @[Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/)

docere = to teach, to cause to know

### Lahelada — 2016-06-02T03:55:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-195845>

So this was already a perfect day but it got better :
I spent the afternoon in the park reading Time 6 and time 14 back to back and finally pieced it all together.Where I am good what I need to do better. I took some selfies but technical reasons prohibit me for posting at the moment so the place holder "Geniol screw head "(Geniol is a local aspirin) will have to do for now.
Came back to news that the contravention of the the 2nd law of thermodynamics" is being talked about here ,too. Lo and behold there is someone spreading the word even down here. Maybe that is a shot in the arm for our Doc up there...

In other news I did my own to promote CT here. I am a poster child as I walk around in Indian summer clothes when everybody else wears fleece and padded jackets. Two ladies had quite an eye opener this afternoon when I asked them how well they felt, how often they got sick and to compare themselves to the guys that walked around in T shirts just like me but worked in the meat freezer section. One said as if she had never noticed before : True that. They do not get sick as often as we do...

Those 2 incidents made my day...

### Lahelada — 2016-06-02T14:41:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-195865>

@[notsoperfick](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/10850/) You are not so late to the party. The question is still on my mind and FB ever so often acts to keep it there by reminding me of where I could study.
Funny thing happened yesterday night at a student/friend's house I was talking about having an offer of an apartment but in area which I know to be bad for EMF. She tried to talk me into it saying : "Think that you would be closer to your patients ,err I mean students oh well same difference". I won't deny that the involuntary slip gave me pleasure , left me open mouthed but also that maybe I am looking for the place where I am best placed and I am already there. Docere = to teach and if my rusty Latin is trust worthy" to bring out "as well. My teaching methods are unconventional in the sense that I assess my student and their current learning ability and adjust their curriculum accordingly . It is quite amazing how really bright minds can be switched off and stay switched off when put under excess pressure from the side where they most seek to excel in,where they feel most vulnerable in ,be it relationship or work. My evening students appear with bloodshot eyes and fixed size pupils as if they had been on a bender for two days on normal days,add unexpected stress and you have the danger of losing your student as they cannot process one more thing .

About nicotine I actually would not like to say too much as people use it for various reason brain clarity, energy, as part of a fasting biohack , a heteroplasmy biohack but in fact we are all working on the same in different guises it seems to me only our presentation is different. Google "Jack Kruse" nicotine and you will get all sorts of good answers.

Another funny from yesterday. I spent a lot of time in the local park and on leaving decided to take a shortcut leaping of a 2 feet high wall. I say leaping it was an ungraceful hop. Oh yes as expected the result was an "Ouch" but surprisingly I held up and stayed on my feet . Previously my leg might have given way and I would have lost balance. First lesson was that my "heart" knew more about what I was capable of doing than what my head was letting me believe. Head was projecting an ungainly splat on the pavement. Second lesson was that I am overcompensating for my right ankle still when there is no need . Collagen recovering?
And yes there were probably less jarring methods of coming to that conclusion . But it was fun to play in the park !

### Lahelada — 2016-06-02T19:09:53+0300

I transcribed it as : "Losing the omnipotent projection of impotence in future events frees up a lot of potency in the now. "
Richard Branson put it better though: Screw it, just do it!
I hope humble pie has no carbs..

### Lahelada — 2016-06-15T16:29:42+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-196627>

And then there was light .... LIGHT in shaping life is here ! Thank youuuu ! It was almost thwarted at the last hurdle and ended up in customs for collection. Not a good sign around these parts usually as the import duty is enormous and the paperwork even more so.
So yesterday I was sitting on an island in the delta, leathersoled boots on and read my first pages. Barefoot would have been better of course but the boots had been on for hours and probably would not have gone on again.

I stopped MB and nic gum for now. Next week I will go for routine blood tests and I am leaving 10 days between the last nic gum and the tests. I miss it. There is no sun to speak of at the moment and I feel rather sluggish with spurts of energy interspersed. Cold helps. Sunbed later this week too. Let's see how that goes.

One good thing to report today is that my right ankle is getting better every day. Until now it was very weak from non use and inflammation that had made it impossible to bend or put my full weight on . There is now a minimal twinge and I can even run a block even in above mentioned boots.

I must get a new UV lamp,mine broke ,maybe that will help too.

The dog is experiencing a renaissance which I feel kind of ridiculous to share as the lights involved are cheap Chinese Xmas lights . Basically ever since Xmas she has made a beeline for the red lights and insists on sleeping right under them . She was one of those pups that came with a black nose that in her first year started to go pink. According to supposition that has to do with melanin. Now age 9 she has a black nose again. I don't have any pics of her before the arrival of teh lights which annoys me .Could it have to do with the lights ?? If they were some sort of biomed light I would not hesitate to think it, but three dollar xmas lights??

### Lahelada — 2016-06-21T14:01:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-196999>

To think I almost did not share that puppy hack..

Air CT yesterday with 4C/19F . People are gasping, jeje. Pain so reduced I can almost do what I want again. Come to think of it, what do I want.

The apartment hunt is not going anywhere. What I have been offered is a 6th floor very nice apartment,big,airy with a bath tub for Ct but it is the 6th floor in a highrise surrounded by highrises in the same area where I used to work. I keep saying , I am stronger ,healthier but even I cannot convince myself of that this will be good for me. It is true , one cannot "unknow".. What I suspected at the beginning of the year though is now happening, inflation is increasing and people are getting paranoid and are even less likely to rent without guarantee. Blah.

One interesting thing, I did a Latin test this weekend. I found my old school report and remembered that I hold the certificate for Comprehensive Latin . Well,lo and behold after 30 years of not even thinking about it I can still pass the exam and am at midlevel . This is kind of important to me as the teaching method is quite different, but seems to stick better than all the modern stuff like multiple choice etc.

### Lahelada — 2016-06-29T03:20:09+0300

Blah,succumbed to the fourth round of "flu" here. The annoying thing is that all the people I told that CT is good for you now tell me "you see.." No mention that they got all four go arounds. The ladies at the chicken shop still have faith. They have taken one out of three jumpers off and are rolling up their sleeves....baby steps
For my treatment I am doing curcumin in everything, mag sulphate/hydrogen peroxide sponged all over my body and in ears. no humidifier or bath tub to intensify treatment.

### Lahelada — 2016-06-29T14:02:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-197509>

Thanks guys. I feel better this morning. The mag, hydroxy seems to have done something , although not a miracle cure. I am better though than could be expected on the second day.
@[Inger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1057/) no fear about taking anything chemical meaning a commercial anti flu thing. It is actually not vene the flu just a nasty cold but ever since the big flu pnic every sniffle is a flu it seems. Everywhere you go there are posters reminding you of the free flu shot. No thanks.

In other news I feel great though. Being cold has extinguished the rest of my ankle/foot pain. I can now run,even bound down stairs . The tell will be if I can make it last over summer or if inflammation will continue. DHA intake this winter will be key.

Trying to get DHA . Still not easy. I have days when I crave fish and others when I cannot stand it. Oysters are ok any day but are in short supply at the moment. Smoked salmon for lunch today though.

### Lahelada — 2016-07-04T12:50:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-197834>

Funny,relevant Story I have not shared yet.
Last Thursday I got a text from a friend saying 2 Ha, you are always cold because the acute stress does you good ." No further explanation. I had had the impression that she looked at me a bit worried the other day when it was really cold and I still was in my T shirt. I wrote back with a Haha, nope not quite but good. I wondered though as at the time of texting she should have been at the doctor's office. I saw her Friday and indeed she had texted me from the doctors office after mentioning my weird case in her consult...Apparently the longhand reply from her doc was I was correct in what I was doing and that I was trying to elicit a paleolithic extreme stress response to combat the physical stresses the modern world puts me under. Now if I interpret that correctly then this is not too far from what we think here. Now there is at least two docs I know of here who are roughly on board with what we do here .

The story goes on though . Her doc told her about her lack of sleep and as same said doc has an undefined programmable light source on his desk we started talking about the effect of light. I told her what I know about sun and frequencies and she is going to buy amber lights,maybe a UV light too. The whole conversation collapsed into heaps of laughter though when her partner came through the door and she told him that soon she would be sleeping well but needed to be under yellow and black light but that he should not worry too much as that will make her younger too. He was quite on board after I explained a little to him , too but the look on his face when we so graphically described his new homelife a minute after he had walked in through the door from work was priceless...

The laughter was good though as on a serious note her doctor had quite graphically explained what she would heading for if she did not adjust her sleep cycle. Part two of the conversation to follow next week.

### Lahelada — 2016-08-09T21:31:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-199460>

So my days since the "I wanna be a doctor" episode have never been quite the same again . I spent the morning preparing a multilevel talk on quantum principles and disease that can either skim the surface depending on acceptance of my audience or go deeper and which I am nervous as heck about and then have to interrupt the undertaking to give a class to a new student.

Well, so I met this student, a lady who lives just across the park from me and we talk about the park and that we should do the class in the park, when it is warmer. I am compelled to comment on how people avoid the sun, how contrary it is to our nature and guess what I have a captive audience who in turn introduces me to the work of Enric Corbera with the apologetic words that to understand his writings I would need to know about quantum physics...

Guess who never stopped talking after that ? Yup, out came haplotypes, Doug Wallace ,mitochondria,grounding and cold thermogenesis in quite a neat little package and to be quite frank I had no idea that I could present as I did. The lady had to remind me that our hour was up and that if I wanted we could talk about this subject next time again . I thought oops got carried away but as it is a conversation class one has to talk about something,right?

Well, I got quickly corrected. The lady came back with my fee augmented by 25% saying that this class was really worth more than my advertised rate and that if I agreed we would continue on this basis...
Was I just paid as a quantum health speaker ? The mind reels...

### Lahelada — 2016-09-11T17:47:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-201302>

Lesson for the rest of my life:

Fear should never be a reason to say NO.
Fear should never be a reason not to ask for help.
Fear should never be a reason not to accept the help you are given.
And sometimes you are not given help so that you may overcome your fear
and that way regain your strength.

My father said it to me : Know when to hold and when to let go, of everything and everyone . Know what people need of you to do. Know what to do for yourself.

Too much going on to explain this so I will just let it stand . Someone out there may just understand.

### Lahelada — 2016-12-07T03:45:02+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-204895>

So it has been three month almost . Time for an update on the cryptic last entry.

Basically I was fed up with myself. Even though I had changed my job there was other things I had not taken into account that I needed to do.

Things I realised: I am not happy to just have a job. I want to make a difference. What difference could that be. Well,there is two avenues. One is my own school which I have talked about before, but one that takes into account low dopamine learning difficulties. I am making in roads with developing a programme and method. I have my first students on a trial basis . They are the family of a friend of mine. basic principles I employ are acting tricks for elocution,very old books that actually overload today's brains . ( as learned here..) and lighting of course.

The other idea still seems a few numbers too big for me . There is also no money in it. A labour of love but I have had a couple of tasters of it and it is very rewarding.

A move is on the cards next year. Outside of the city definitely or maybe into the country completely. I am getting teaching offers left right and centre. The one that intrigues me most is going to the Patagonia where English teachers are needed for companies and schools. Low EMf, but harsh winters . UV is dicy , only at altitude and also in summer really but the altitudes to be had are no more than 2200 feet. However being a Northern haplotype it might be enough. Worth a biohack maybe.

I am single again...Basically our paths were not very joined from the beginning. Which I had realised at the beginning but things change ,right ? Right...not! So better to paddle my own canoe. Over the last three month I realised what an energy drain this has been on me.

In another update I will try and do a health review. I will send ahead though that I am now having my first completely painfree days ,in other words to include the pesky ankle that previously always hurt and weight is creeping into the right direction,too.

### fitness@home — 2016-12-07T14:50:10+0200

Glad to hear you are pain free. Might have something to do with removing the energy drain from your life

Can't wait to hear what develops...

### Lahelada — 2016-12-09T01:06:02+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-205024>

@[fitness@home](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/5474/) Thank you and I think you may have a point there.

I am going camping in the Parana delta ! 3 days with no wifi around and maybe not even electricity. There is cellphone coverage and for safety I am taking my cell with me. Sleeping under the stars. How long have I wanted to do that? Sheesh.

[https://www.google.com.ar/maps/place/Río Sarmiento/@-34.3826993,-58.5746772,4007m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m5!3m4!1s0x95bca6812d3c2bbf:0x1144fa3ac99279b7!8m2!3d-34.3958746!4d-58.5724011](https://www.google.com.ar/maps/place/R%C3%ADo+Sarmiento/@-34.3826993,-58.5746772,4007m/data=!3m1!1e3!4m5!3m4!1s0x95bca6812d3c2bbf:0x1144fa3ac99279b7!8m2!3d-34.3958746!4d-58.5724011)

### caroline — 2016-12-09T08:53:23+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-205036>

Your life will really change forever now - no going back my friend!

The stars and the moon and the sun and mother nature will capture you and hold you close forever.....

no questions asked.....
xo

### Lahelada — 2016-12-19T00:28:50+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-205452>

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" } [](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/img_20161204_140256-jpg.4043/) So I went for a bit of a wander with no special thought in mind ,except for finding a lake to swim in. My search turned up this village at the end of a train line barely in commuting distance to the city.People use it to get away from the city.many weekend homes and therefore a rental market. I had not been looking especially but one thing happened there that caught my attention. I had my bike with me but thought that I should get some grounding in. Well to my surprise it felt like nothing experienced in the city . My own lawn is lifeless in comparison. I could not get enough of it . I will go out there again with a meter and see what is really there. One good thing is that it is not big enough for free wifi ,so no huge antennas around.

### Lahelada — 2016-12-19T00:33:18+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-205453>

[](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/img_20161211_092807-jpg.4044/) Now this was a half a..ed biohack. A friend has a cabin in teh delta and I had asked him to lend it to me before he wires it for electricity. I told him that I wanted to experience it before he ruins it. A friend I can have these kinds of conversations with ! Love ya!

The day I arrived I dumped myself unceremoniously on the balcon and did not move again for the rest of the day. I had come equipped with unread blogs but I fell asleep even before nightfall. Slept in two halves. Awoke at 2 am to get covers .Yes, I slept outside but 8 ft off the ground as there was a tide coming in from the river. Awoke at 5 am,decided that the sunrise I had wanted to see could wait ,that after so many years the sun would do its thing just fine with out me and slept until 9 . Totally unlike me.I am up at 6 without fail ,without alarm clock. Energy slump continued. Spent day reading and sunbathing.

Second night again freezing cold, even though it was a very hot day. This time I woke up with lumbar pain that took me two days to get rid off again . I will repeat the experiment this time sleeping on the ground. A non starter if that is what affected me negatively as all the houses because of the highly variable tides have to be built on stilts .

I had not planned this really as I had 24 hours notice so no meters nothing. This place is technically nearer to the city but only connected by boat. No antennas but a street lamp outside the house,yellow though which is uncommon here. No wifi and only very intermittent 3G coverage. A ready made community and a conundrum. I spoke to a new friend who was interested in why I slept outside nd invited me to live there with the blessing of the locals,as in not be a tourist but be part of the resident community. And then she shared that she is T2D , after literally living in the forest for 16 years. Skinny as a rake and ebony from sun exposure. Dirty electricity ? Wiring is haphazard. Water supply ? Rudimentarily treated river water and bottled for drinking . Hmmm ,something not right. Keep on list for closer look but carry on searching.

### caroline — 2016-12-19T06:02:02+0200

so much to learn ....... so little time xo

And then she shared that she is T2D , after literally living in the forest for 16 years. Skinny as a rake and ebony from sun exposure. Dirty electricity ? Wiring is haphazard. Water supply ? Rudimentarily treated river water and bottled for drinking . Hmmm ,something not right. Keep on list for closer look but carry on searching.

Dirty Electricity = more chronic BLUE LIGHT EXPOSURE = Elevates Blood Sugar Among Electrically Sensitive Diabetics and May explain Brittle Diabetes and type 1 cases.
"Abstract
Transient electromagnetic fields (dirty electricity), in the kilohertz range on electrical wiring, may be contributing to elevated blood sugar levels among diabetics and pre-diabetics. By closely following plasma glucose levels in four Type 1 and Type 2 diabetics, we find that they responded directly to the amount of dirty electricity in their environment. In an electromagnetically clean environment, Type 1 diabetics require less insulin and Type 2 diabetics have lower levels of plasma glucose. Dirty electricity, generated by electronic equipment and wireless devices, is ubiquitous in the environment. Exercise on a treadmill, which produces dirty electricity, increases plasma glucose. These findings may explain why brittle diabetics have difficulty regulating blood sugar. Based on estimates of people who suffer from symptoms of electrical hypersensitivity (3-35%), as many as 5-60 million diabetics worldwide may be affected. Exposure to electromagnetic pollution in its various forms may account for higher plasma glucose levels and may contribute to the misdiagnosis of diabetes. Reducing exposure to electromagnetic pollution by avoidance or with specially designed GS filters may enable some diabetics to better regulate their blood sugar with less medication and borderline or pre-diabetics to remain non diabetic longer." [https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/18568931](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/18568931)

### Jack Kruse — 2016-12-19T14:18:28+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-205474>

Electric light means, less chance for sun, and less sun means more darkness, but in modern civilization, that's more LEDs and CFLs being used at longer periods of time in the winter to light up the longer-dark.
And where does the light come from? Modern society thinks getting cancer is a normal aspect of life. I do not. I know better. In 1900, it was very rare. What else was rare in 1900? AC electricity. Some people think Tesla and Edison were wonderful innovators, but I would not be one of those people. Willfully polluting the ground and ionosphere with AC electric and magnetic fields is just another aspect of how the electrical utility companies will be remembered by the next generation. A "mitochondriac" would know better. Protect your eyes and skin when you are in man made light and you'll avoid modern diseases.

### Lahelada — 2016-12-19T23:27:37+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-205496>

@[Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) Thank you. So my first hunch was correct r e electricity. No measurements but such "nice" electricity in teh middle of nowhere with very little rentability for the electricity company is suspect. I need to get a Cornet like contraption. I like my intuitive hunches but am liking numbers better now.
The houses generally look like this. I put an arrow to the electricity cable entry point but it was not connected when I was there and the network connection point was at 60 ft distance. Still the ground is strange there so measurements are in order as there might be stray electricity from the overhead cable at the same distance. Difficult to explain as the systems are way older that in the US . I am at the start of my search only . After New year I will search in earnest as time is running out in my current place. [](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/img-20160919-wa0015-jpg.4067/)

### Lahelada — 2016-12-20T00:52:46+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-205504>

Conversation of the year with a student: "In Germany I have Hashi's and here it does not exist... I told my mother a doctor and she says whatever my colleague here says must be correct ... " I will meet said mother at an Xmas party. I think I know what I will be asked . Lucky me.

### Lahelada — 2016-12-26T20:02:27+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-205806>

I am thinking of ending this year with posting what I did well and what I did badly.

Isotyocyanates :loquat leaves and fruit

End of winter I decided that I would make full use of the loquat harvest of the tree in my garden. I used the leaves for taco wraps and later ate the unwashed fruit directly off the tree. Goes to repopulating the microbiome

[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/april-webinar-meets-sulfur-and-selenium.17861/](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/april-webinar-meets-sulfur-and-selenium.17861/)
[http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1756464613002879](http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1756464613002879)

Worst decision of the year : Amount of blue light I allow which I cannot offset sufficiently by sun exposure . Net result : Weight gain

### Lahelada — 2016-12-26T20:18:37+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-205807>

Brain function: Variable by day. With the help of MB I have achieved more clarity but also an outlook younger than my years. My students even comment on it. I am very happy with progress in cognitive function and information retention.I have remarked elsewhere that I have moments when I regurgitate something I did not even know that I had learned .However the form of the day is very much dependent on what environment I move in. While blue light from this screen is detrimental,the real exhaustion is moving through the city in high EMF areas. It was pointed out to me that my typing in terms of error rate is way worse at night especially on Wed and Thurs when I am in the centre nearly all day. Hence the need to move and change my schedule without loss of income.

### Lahelada — 2017-01-10T17:00:18+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-206510>

So I accidentally solved the mystery of the Delta cabin. Talking to a friend she told me that she was amazed that she could get good enough 4G reception to be able to do a videoconference with Germany from a cabin there. My cabin seems to be in the 4 G corridor but is not marked as such on the websites I know. My phone is 3G so I did not see it ,nor teh cellmasts. 4G does not agree with me during the day , and apparently even less at night.

So what is left to do. Lose this damn weight now. I think I am at my lowest inflammation level for the longest time. Impatience and vanity says do it now,prudence suggests winter. Lets see what Nature lets me do without forcing things.

### Lahelada — 2017-03-31T00:00:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-211429>

Best laid plans and all that!!
I found out a month ago that I would finally have to move. Boy what an endeavour it is to move within town only. It was easier moving countries. Rules and regs are ridiculous. So biohack lake had to be shelved until spring ( Sthn hemisphere spring) The lake is inaccesible in winter.
So this the reason I have been quiet recently.

On the upside lots of new friends, a social life for once  and generally I am happy with my state of health. Not that it could not be better. It could and should,but it is a blessing to be able to run for a bus without getting unduely out of breath or aches but more progress cannot be made in this environment I do not think. So this move is for a few months and then somewhere else.
@[notsoperfick](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/10850/) Thanks for looking for me . I responded to you here so as not to get the other post of track.

### Lahelada — 2017-04-02T16:29:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-211599>

It is done!! The house has been found. My stress levels are through the roof but I'll live .
The new place is really cute, larger than my current place and very well laid out. It has an outside space where I can put a CT mini pool. Only one wifi "looks" into the house although the owner who lives next door may put wifi in at some stage.

It is 25 miles outside the city, no cell towers near. In spite of that it has some 4G coverage. It was important to me to escape out of the 4G area as end of the year the trials for 5g start. The air seems to be better than in the capital although it is not rural yet .

While I was there I had a "strange thought" I was reminded of my Grandmas kitchen as the kitchen is very old fashioned. The thought was: "Yes,here I could hear a clock ticking again" This goes back to my Grandmas kitchen where often while doing homework the only noise I heard was said ticking. Yesterday it made me wonder though if what I was sensing in the new place was the near absence of non native frequencies.

Well so far so good. Contractual stuff is still outstanding. All being well I will move next Saturday.

### notsoperfick — 2017-05-04T23:21:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-213387>

I can't tell you how often I've been disturbed because I could hear a clock ticking and didn't recognise it! We have three in different places and I only hear them if it's quiet and I wonder what "that" noise is, feel foolish when I realise.

How lovely you've found a new home that seems already to be loving you back  I'd love to move, we don't live in a city we're fairly rural but I've never liked the house. I think maybe as hubby really doesn't want to move that I should try to make the house nearer to somewhere I want to be, not easy, it would be like trying to make pastry with playdoh lol.

### Lahelada — 2017-05-14T04:18:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-214017>

I hope you can @[notsoperfick](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/10850/) . I am appreciating my space ever more.

In other news the jump has been made. I left the capital. I am too tired to make sense tonight but I will update tomorrow. For now a visualisation of what I have left behind above. I positioned myself in between the two behemoths of cities for now. This is an interim thing. A bigger move needs more careful planning . For those of you who do not know I used to live in the northern part of Buenos Aires Capital. I have moved myself midway between Buenos Aires and La Plata.

### caroline — 2017-05-14T04:41:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-214019>

sending you a big bear hug xo

I heard this on the radio this morning ......"Have a generous heart - and you will attract miracles"

### Lahelada — 2017-05-21T14:27:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-214372>

Finally a bit of time to update here. I have spent the whole week running,either to work or getting the bits and pieces that are missing after moving from a furnished house to a very empty one. The house has no heating as is custom here and I think I shall leave it like that. People normally buy electric or gas heaters.
The house is cool in other ways ,too. Blue exterior,orange kitchen,burgundy red bedroom. I will try to complete the spectrum with accessories.

So how do I feel? Energised would be the best way to put it and yet I am calmer. Thoughts no longer chase each other without end, but have a beginning and an end if that is understandable. I sleep eight hours on average,but late as my commute time is 1.5 to two hours. Nevertheless I wake up fully conscious,no need for coffee,although I indulge. I dream and I dream interesting things, too..

Physically, my skin is smoother, less dry without changing water intake. The most surprising thing is my hair. Volume ! There are days when I need to tame it.

I seem to give off interesting vibes ,too . Men seem to have me on the radar again. Not doing anything about that at the moment but it is a nice to know.

A closing thought about friends - I made some great new ones.Each and everyone offered some contribution to my move,be it time,money or things or most importantly a hug when finding a new place seemed impossible.

More updates soon. Weight shifting time!

### Lahelada — 2017-05-21T14:43:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-214373>

**EMF load :**

Wifi : 1 permanent with 2 more floating in occasionally. The place where I sleep has one weak signal. Interesting to note that I selected this spot before measuring and it is not the traditional spot to place a bed.the rest of the house has one full system and low level "lookins" from 2 more systems.
(measured with Ekahau).

Cell phone: 4g is sporadic, 3g is the norm. Inside the house there is almost no coverage. As this is a double edged sword I tend to go out on the patio to switch my phone on .
Cell towers : One 3/4 of a mile away . There may be repeater stations as I am 4 blocks from a highway.

### Lahelada — 2018-02-24T21:43:38+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-235640>

I feel like a stranger in my own journal.So many things have happened ,some brilliant,some blah but wow has my life gained colour.
First of all though the anamnesis that I should have done at the beginning but did not know how.
**Grandmother:** country upbringing very much carb based but always outside in the North of Germany. No devotee to CT though
state of health/mind: 2nd youngest of 12, war time traumas,"cold exterior" varicouse veins, nighttime cramps, thoughts that were going around her head on a carousel at night without resolution ( her description), night cramps/tachycardia,miserlyness even though rich, first signs of dementia growing into full blown Alzheimers died age 81
**Mother:** it pains me to say it but a non entity. Spent her life in an escape world of dime store novels , prescribed tranquilizer pills (valium) for all of her life and booze, ovarian cancer, a fall that terminated in an artificially induced coma,stopped drinking died age 64 muerte subito in her sleep supposedly a never diagnosed heart problem . Mother was prone to falling, no surprise with an alcoholic. If someone had really seen her they probably would have recognised Parkinsons in later years. Never diagnosed though.Looking at the last pictures now I can see the tell tale mask.

**Me :** Uiii! strange kid ! Not breastfed. Wanted vegetables and all things carbs (deuterium ?) but I would no eat meat. Night time terrors /screaming pediatrician diagnosed me as not being able to process all new impressions received during the day. Strange cravings for all things vegetable especially green beans with vinegar and strawberries. Allergy to beestings pediatrician prescribed B12 .Glasses for myopia at age 15. Moved to London age 19. Inflated like a yeast dough with max weight of 230pounds. Calorie counting works, then South Beach diet worked then Atkins then low carb paleo..
No real medical problems I sought advice for (!) but out of the blue I developed OCD. At age 34 or so I woke up to find that my speech had altered . Before speech was analytical and crisp but now overnight I found myself to be meandering and searching for the correct word. Working in an EMF hellhole at the time. Telephone exchange! That meant working next door to 100s of high power CPU units not to mention my own CRT terminal . The exchange room was only separated from us by a normal wall and I cannot even tell you how many antennas were on the roof. Always an overachiever, always the helpful one but it cost more effort every day. I finally took the golden handshake and moved to Mexico Loved Mexico but a disastrous location. High frequency powerlines at 300 yards, house at 7000ft altitude,smog and an indoor lifestyle. Weight ballooned. After 6 years of that I moved to Argentina. Fell out of the blue , no bumpin the road to "excuse it " Adopted outdoors lifestyle,sailing on the river,lost weight on a high fat Paleo diet,everyone aghast,including me. I accidentally did most things right in a Kruse sort of way. Slimmish ! Then money ran out ( Bad financial judgment then) Got a job in a hotel. EMF hell . All neuropathy, movement disorder problems returned and multiplied. Weight balloons again. Brain fog. Propioception issues. Hightailed it out of there when I realised my nonexistant morning pulse. Herniated disc in the lumbar region. Money issues made recovery difficult. Still fat but use of MB and nicotine a blessing.
2018 is now dedicated to turning around weight and health .

### Lahelada — 2018-02-25T19:32:29+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-235704>

Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

Working on making this a reality. Next week I will start talking to people to create a retreat for people who want to rewild themselves,learn what it means to slip out of the comfort zone.to read the elements again.
There is three of us each one with a different specialty but all with a hunger for the outdoors.

The aim of such a retreat would be to prove the efficacy of nature stays to augment wellbeing in the average Joe. Provide measurable results to take home to the surreal ,real world.

This place is far from "civilisation" latitude 34 . We are number crunching ,looking at other alternatives around Argentina ,too. What attracts me about this place is that it is not Disney, no artesanal food for tourists. It is homemade, there is what there is if you want something else you have to go somewhere else, simple as that. Make do. Hospitable,hands on people. Far away from big agriculture. Snow melt rivers, natural thermal springs.

Would you come ? Getting there would mean a bus trip of 12 hours or two internal flights.

### Lahelada — 2018-03-05T01:58:38+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-236296>

So this morning I was going to share how I was the centre of attention at a party with a lot of doctors present . Why was I the centre of attention? Because I held an impromptu discourse on mitochondia ,how they function ,the work of Nick Lane, the problems with ATP production due to stretched out respiratory proteins, the role of deuterium in slowing down the ATP synthase and an excursion into red light and its significance. I was well pleased with myself as while I have good thoughts I do not always manage to convey them succinctly. To hear one of the unknown docs asking my friend whether I was a doc too and being told that I was the English teacher and then seeing the face of the doc was priceless. Who read my diary a bit earlier may remember the day when I was hellbent to join the ranks of doctors to make a difference , so this was kind of important to me to be able to stand my ground in my white bathrobe from Bed bath and Beyond so to speak.

However, I told this story to two people as I told it here. What was heard was quite different. Doctors never listen, do not care ,do not understand. The latter is absolutely correct. They do not understand as they have never been taught. If you open the 2016 edition of the Boron it talks about the hypothesis of quimio osmosis as formulated in 1987. So nothing of the work of Nick Lane, not to mention Dr Wallace,not by a long shot. Dr Kruse himself talks about the pain his discoveries have caused him at the time. I think we must be aware that it is a bittersweet victory over essentially good people who are trying to give their best and often more than that.

I was happy to be heard yesterday and remembered with gratitude my doctor friends who while not being able to agree with what I say helped me hone my analytic skills to be able to have that kind of conversation as I had yesterday. I have said thank you to Dr K many times, but this time I also want to say thank you to the doctors and my friend the biochemist who took time out to listen to me ,explain, counter and check my reasoning. This includes the surprised doctors of yesterday.

### Lahelada — 2018-03-08T15:34:29+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-236669>

We also had an impromptu Argentine Kruse summit . Of 4 people!!  The blogs are hard to read for non native speakers unfortunately. But there is interest. There were three personal trainers , two of them also biochemists and me. New friendships made , old friendships renewed,. Two are the founders of a quantum principle inspired gym with redlight CT room and access to natural UV light. It is the first gym that takes a "holistic" view of the aspiring training candidate with various specialities on call. (Kinesiologists, doctor,nutritionist etc) We had an interesting chat at its inauguration with a lady still very much married to paleo and nutrition, but also implementing a partial protocol of red light and CT.

Oysters could not be eaten in abundance as this is a month without good supply and for two of us we could only find 6 good ones in the heap. But we had oysters with some glaciar water ! I did not particularly care for them.It seems that in this season they are a lot drier and creamier.

Various other projects were planned,including my brainchild of wellness retreats that offer "rewilding" I have selected an area that I think will be very suitable. Andes mountains, water in limestone basins,natural thermal springs and until now very little cell coverage. In fact I have been offered cabins with no coverage of anything not even a landline. It is not Mendoza though. My reasons for deciding against Mendoza or Cordoba were that they still have commercial interest, Cordoba due to soy and Mendoza is also an agricultural province and wine region so there are more commercial interests there. Hence the implementation uptake of 5G will be slower. Additionally I can never be sure of glyphosate load unless going up very high in Mendoza which would present acclimatisation problems for our short stay guests. So I selected a forgotten area of the country. Food offerings will be limited but all natural. 100 % grassfed (at altitude) kid meat, cheeses from a farm at 2500m altitude, glacial water from Ushuaia ( DDW status not established though) Vegetables from there should be better as well but still under investigation. I am still looking for expansion items, too. The problem with anywhere in the interior is that seafood is hard and expensive to come by. Working on that.

### Lahelada — 2018-03-08T16:02:00+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-236670>

Something very interesting happened ,too . I had been planning the above for a good while now but with the arrival of my friend from the interior of the country I developed a sense of urgency. ( About time you say ? I agree..) As I said above my friend is a personal trainer who is outside whenever possible, grounds whenever possible and spends a good deal of time disconnected. So he was surprised that when he arrived after a 12hour bus ride that his feet and calves were swollen. It is not something that ever happens to him . Well,but not surprising is it when a 6 ft 3 guy is squeezed into a commercial bus seat? Well, there was the wifi too... We both though that the swelling would go down the next day. Nope ,not even first thing in the morning even though he slept grounded (I think! old marblefloor with gaps laid on a concrete bed without barrier) As we spent the days in the city the swelling never went down. He used my red light 660/940 biobeam- no effect. Mag sulfate solution on legs before bed also not efficient. Sleeping on grass in the sun in a suburban area also had no effect. The picure below was the state of his feet when he went home. Within 24 hours of being home his feet were normal after the same 12 hour trip on a wifi equipped bus. His house is not an EMF free zone as he has wifi at home and still this happened. The difference is that he lives in a more rural area with alower but not low population density and therefore I believe only one other wifi system affecting his house. I mentioned this to various ladies and they confirm that they also have swollen feet but put it down to footwear which made me remember a one off incident with my cowboy boots. I always have trouble putting them on at home. I stayed at another house once under slightly stressful circumstances ,only slept 5 hours after making myself suffer a long evening with sugar laden food and even with this the next morning my cowboy boots slipped on as if my legs were buttered. Too many "coincidences" I think.

### JanSz — 2018-03-09T13:54:05+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-236753>

> [Lahelada said:](/goto/post?id=236671)
>
> [View attachment 7038](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/7038/) After three days in the city

I have recently been thru this type of experience.
But I have my explanation.
Not sure how to apply my explanation to this case.

But just in case, next time you friend visits you, may want to try this:
give him NoSalt or banana (and look at his feet).
\----------------------------------------
**Short:**
Sodium/Potassium balance (or lack of it)
Possibly including:
Antidiuretic Hormone (ADH) ----->(may need tweaking using: )
Vassopressin
Desmoporessin
\-----------------------------------------
**Longer:**
I have a long history of nightly muscle cramps.
Used quinine or Tonic Water (that contains quinine) to relieve those cramps
Have tried Potassium pills (but it turned out that I was not observing correctly, not connecting dots)
Recently I found that Magnesium & Potassium Aspartate from NOW works like a charm. When I forget taking it, cramps appear on same night. (Easy to make connection).
But then comes @[Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) posts (somebody's) video on salt, I learned that it is ok to eat even 6 tablespoons of salt daily, so I have started eating two teaspoons daily of Redmond Salt. (And stopped eating Magnesium & Potassium Aspartate from NOW)
After two weeks eating two teaspoons of salt I newer had cramps but got swollen feet.
Stopped eating salt, after one week my feet got back to normal.
Discussing my story I got response from @[Scompy](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/17718/) .
Suggestion to eat No-Salt which is a variety of Potassium salts.
[https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B0049IRCAA/ref=oh\_aui\_search\_detailpage?ie=UTF8&psc=1](https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B0049IRCAA/ref=oh_aui_search_detailpage?ie=UTF8&psc=1)
Now
I have normal feet, no nightly cramps.
Use Redmond Salt
and every day or so 1/4 or 1/8 teaspoon of NoSalt

When I do my blood testing, one of the tests is
Complete Blood Count (CBC)
Usually my sodium and potassium are ok on those tests.
This time I had a second look and found that few years back I had lowish potassium.
That may be the indicator that I have to watch my potassium.

### Lahelada — 2018-03-12T15:52:41+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-237042>

**_" THE FIRST 4 THORACIC NERVES ARE KEY TO THE SYMPATHETIC CHAIN TO THE RETINA AND BRAIN_**
_This is why brown adipose tissue (BAT) is found over the posterior neck region where this ganglia exists. People have failed to link the anatomic function to the mitochondrial purpose of this link because it is quantum. The signal to burn fat is controlled by the [hormone betatrophin](http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1388198115001997). Betatrophin leads to less fat burning because it suppresses adipose triglyceride lipase, an enzyme that breaks down stored fat. A lack of UV light from the retinal pathways raises betatrophin. **That is why sun light has a massive effect on the amount of brown fat over the nape of your neck. (highlight is mine)** It is also why blue light can give you a huge white fat pad over neck devoid of any brown fat. Brown fat is brown because it has a higher mitochondrial density to burn fat. **That pathway is buried in your first 4 thoracic nerves then signals burning of the visceral fat in your gut. So what happens if you live a life where the skin innervating this fat pad never see sunlight?**

If any of the initial sensory pathways are interrupted from these nerves that give input to the superior cervical ganglion, the entire feedback control mechanism is disrupted. An altered spectrum of light can do this. **Betatrophin** is a stress hormone linked to an altered spectrum of light in this region. This tells you clothing or working out indoors will send altered signals from these thoracic nerves to the superior cervical ganglion. What does this ganglion control? It control blood flow to the eye, RPE, and to the entire brain. Betatrophin is a stress protein that causes histidine deprivation in our cells. This mechanism is [well worked in plants](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC419945/) but no one seems to realize it works in humans using light signaling. Why is histidine linked to a light story?

This changes how our tissues work photoelectrically using either the particle part of light or the wave form of light. Light carries this duality naturally and the tissue that measures it determines what part of light it will use. We need a strong UV stimulus on our surfaces, to burn fat well in mammals using the particle part of the photoelectric effect. This frequency of light shrinks the respiratory proteins best because it makes melatonin locally that act to control mitochondrial DNA. "_
So a strapless dress ,with MB applied to the neck area may be a really good idea when not in the city. Followed by covering every inch of skin at night and when in the city. The new part of the strategy is MB in that area and covering EVERY inch.

I used to have that fat pad in the neck area. I still have the visceral fat pad in the middle though. Light balance is clearly off and I cannot say I am surprised. Neither am I sorry. The education I got was worth it .

### Penny — 2018-03-13T00:44:06+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-237086>

I just went to Costco and bought 40 lbs of potassium chloride to dump into the water conditioner - for a family of 4, you're supposed to use 4 bags every 2 months - i.e., you don't have to use a lot for effect - a guy at Costco said after putting it in his water conditioner, his blood pressure and a whole lot of other things normalized - I have been using potassium bicarbonate and coconut water and find all pain just goes away - this is because potassium "glues" water - as I am constantly screwing up, I am constantly depleted of potassium as I am constantly peeing - the salt helps a lot, but it doesn't hold a candle to the potassium IMHO - dehydration is my biggest issue - actually, my stupid choices are my biggest issue I thought it would be fun to try a foot soak in it or make a spray like mag chloride - which also makes pain disappear -\[/quote\]

So I have just turned down a lucrative contract because the work would be in a 5G like building 2 hours a week. I might have been able to do it but it would have nothing to do with getting better. Staying the same with 4G is already a struggle, getting more optimal even more so. I really did not want to add another wild card into the mix.

End of the month I am moving again. New apartment, EMF meter in the green,no wifi and a very private patio where I can see the sunrise through the trees that overhang my patio.

Not my final move though.The bigger one is outstanding and every day it is calling my name more.

### Penny — 2018-03-22T21:01:12+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-237766>

> [JanSz said:](/goto/post?id=237728)

> 1--Would I need different water softener if I would change to potassium chloride?

potassium chloride runs $23.00 per bag at Costco here - I never went for it before because I can't really afford that - but, the bag says that you only need 1 -4 bags per month depending upon usage so I thought it would be a great hack - personally, I use potassium bicarbonate in the morning before my shower and notice I don't pee half as much - add bacon for that DDW that your mito makes (116PPM - it's in the Boros Lazlo lecture on beta oxidation - like minute 22 or something - he chats about how much and which kind of fat makes the most DDW - which is cheaper than buying DDW )

I don't change out the salt that's already in there, I just add a bag - I'm starting with once a week or two and seeing if there are any improvements - mainly for my family as I have a cheap source of potassium myself :
[https://www.amazon.com/Home-Brew-Oh...1745121&sr=8-4&keywords=potassium+bicarbonate](https://www.amazon.com/Home-Brew-Ohio-3N-PD8E-MWY4-Bicarbonate/dp/B0064GZPU4/ref=sr_1_4?ie=UTF8&qid=1521745121&sr=8-4&keywords=potassium+bicarbonate)

If you do this, do not exceed 2 grams and the daily requirement is 4.5 grams - I use the bicarbonate form as it makes an EZ -

I don't know if potassium citrate is more bioavailable - I might try that next - but for energy, well, I play 3 hours of tennis with college kid on Saturday mornings and have no trouble keeping up

### Lahelada — 2018-04-11T16:42:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-239223>

So I moved again. Still in the same area but right on the outskirts of town. There is undevelopped fields one street behind my house. Only one wifi looking in. The tap water maybe reverse osmosis but that may just be election campaign talk. It is better though in terms of PH. The water in the last place was hard.
The house has a patio where I can almost see the sunrise. I take the dog for a walk and in the fields I can see the sunrise perfectly though. The only drawback here is mosquitoes ! I accidentally solved my transport problem too. I was on public transport a lot, 6 hours a day and it took a toll. I habve now reduced it to 3 hours a day in shorter bursts. It also makes my nights longer as I get home earlier.
So this place is cheap,nothing to look at but comfortable. It is intended as a stop off point before the big move down south. I need to raise money and that needs me nearer to the Capital still.

The big plan is still a place in the Patagonia about 350 miles from Mendoza, Köppen-Geiger classification BSk. I am chosing this area as I still get meltwater, but also thermal springs. The area is a backwater, the nearest chain supermarket 200 miles away. It is where I will set up a Centre for Wellness tourists from all over the world with professionals on call but the grand idea will be to learn to re appreciate the "nothing and everything " of the wilderness. Of course this will be a shoestring set up with the first project planned for November 2018, our spring. There will be other projects for local groups but they have no date yet.

### Phosphene — 2018-04-25T02:01:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-239877>

I adore super spicy food and buy many spices in bulk from Asian/Indian shops (and Vitacost.com too—great prices for organic). I’d say a pound of ground cayenne lasts me about a year under normal circumstances, but I also use vast amounts of hot sauce and other curry and chile powders, horseradish, etc. (always on the hunt for good ones).

I convinced my kids to embrace spicy food at a tender age by saying it wasn’t burning, just tingling... on the way in and out! All a matter of perception and context.

And yes, some cooling dairy is the essential fire extinguisher. I love how mango lassi is pronounced ‘lussie’. Fun to say, fun to eat. Sad that we shouldn’t be eating tropical fruit up north though. A bit is ok in the summer, right?

### Lahelada — 2018-05-01T16:32:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ever-decreasing-circles.7493/post-240281>

So it has been three weeks that I have been in this new house. A lot of people have asked me why I need to live in such a downmarket area. My answers have varied according to whether I thought people could understand it. I said it saves me money for a bigger project and people I care about or who I think could understand I told the real reason.

The electromagnetic quietness. It could still be the honeymoon period, placebo whatever but this is what I have noted. Most of it is soft evidence but..
1\. my sleep normalised within three days of arrival. Some mosquito filled nights being the exception. I go to bed at 8pm sometimes and sleep until the next day at 7.
2\. The feet swelling I talked about only happens sometimes in dependent edema form now,when I have been walking miles in the city,i.e I do not wake up with swollen feet
3\. My skin looks better,colourwise and texture wise.
4\. I feel settled,not driven to do stuff. I can just sit here in my house and watch the avocado tree move in the wind. That is something I like to do when outside but in my house before I did not experience that stillness .
5\. The dog had the most remarkable change again. She had whitish discharge that would not go away. Within a week of arriving here her eyes were clear - no treatment.

So,is this a forever place? No. Nothing ever can be in this pre 5G world. I have good 4g reception here but it is a poor area. It could go two ways. No antennas get installed as there is no spending power( I doubt that actually. The need for a dopamine hit at payday is palpably in the air.People are living from paycheck to paycheck and immediately spend their earnings on a treat) It could also be that this area is first as a pass through to the more affluent areas around.
The plan is to get out of the rat race as soon as possible. What this house does is give me the quiet base to do this from,nothing more. There is still air pollution, EMF while travelling working in the capital,light pollution.

As my house is right at the edge of town I can ground in the fieldswhile watching the sunrise. Another bonus.

Measurements in my house show weak fields. Magnetic fields are < 20 nanotesla
Electric 6 to 15 V per metre
High frequencies 40-100 microwatt per square meter.
Outside measurements are similar with a spike in the high frequency range depending where I walk

# Thread: Simply the Best are you!
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/simply-the-best-are-you.7501/>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 7
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### tySm4mymobility — 2013-06-29T02:25:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/simply-the-best-are-you.7501/post-89153>

Dear Dr. Kruse:

I only _thought_ I was impressed after meeting you. Having read the literature I was given, I found this site after an interview you did. Simply amazing.

To refresh your memory,, I came to your office with a "L-1 lumbar compression fracture" not two months ago, wearing a back brace and using a walker. Yeah!, that's Meee lol Well, I just Had to let you know how wonderful I am doing since my surgery. When I was able to leave the hospital without the brace or walker, (as you said I would be) I was brought to tears. The outcome of my injury had seemed dismal, at best, with all I had been though,, as you can imagine. However, I am getting around so very well, with minimal pain. I even got up the nerve to hop on my riding lawn mower 2 weeks ago! Something I just Knew was out of the question before being introduced to you. I am at a loss for words to express my appreciation. All I know is I thank God everyday and night for leading me to you. I only Pray that others who need you will be so fortunate.

May God continue to Bless and guide you in your path of wisdom, and mission of teaching and healing. I know I am a better person for having the privilege of crossing your path. I know miracles Do happen!

Have a Great 4th of July

Kindest regards,
Kathryn Midgley

### Jack Kruse — 2013-06-29T03:38:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/simply-the-best-are-you.7501/post-89157>

Kathryn I do remember you. How could I not? My duty is give you my best. If there is an "A" available I will do my best to give it to you. I am very glad to hear how you are doing. You should send this into the clinic and to surgery center........you were the first one they had ever seen and they just could not fathom you could be on a walker with tears in your eyes and walk out of the OR after 6 minutes.......pain free. Like I tell my people here on my site, When you know better we do better.
Medicine is becoming a jaded profession. I am grateful to my patients for inviting me into their lives for a small time to try to do what I can for them. I dont have all the answers but I will try to turn over ever stone I can think of turning over to help others. We must pay it forward.

Sometimes it takes crisis to get people moving past themselves. When we begin to feel fear and we fear loss we are capable of extraordinary things. You exemplify this.

The best healing Rx I know is teaching people how to find their passions. When you are passionate about life you provide energy for the room you're in. Passion provides the energy for leadership in your transformation. Everybody should seek their own passions because it instantly creates a positive atmosphere around you. It gives you a sense of gravity and others are drawn to you. You can never "limit" yourself with your passions. Your passions may be few, yet through them thousands of doors will open to, and for, you. 8 years ago I made a decision that altered my life. I chose to never again do work that didn't arise out of my passions. I found that I am astounded by how far their reach extends to all aspects of my life. The only limits which exist are the ones YOU put in place. Today begin to close your eyes. Breathe. Dream. Choose. Risk. Live a life of passionate pursuits now. Reap the joy that is waiting for you. I assure you, if you are living "the passionate life" on the other side of all your fears is a passionate freedom that will liberate your soul. Success is an inside job when your are passionate about life.

In your case, the other surgeon passing you over was good. Sometimes the wrong choices bring us to the right places. Embrace your now, you never know where it will bring you unless you live it.

You made my weekend with this post.

### caroline — 2013-06-29T07:31:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/simply-the-best-are-you.7501/post-89179>

Thanks for sharing your wonderful story.....

What you should know 1) Acceleration of ATP production reduces all causes of mortality 2) Sunlight is >50% Red + Infrared (IR) light 3) Morning first hour & evening last hour is pure IR. Get that early morning & late afternoon sun for the red but adding some UVA for the win for photorepair. Nature’s already got you covered.

### Grizz — 2013-07-03T17:22:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hypothyroid-anything-additional-besides-leptin-rx-and-adrenal-rx.7508/post-89448>

**Here is a very compelling article about fluoride on our general health:**

Once in the body, fluoride is a destroyer of human enzymes. It does this by changing their shapes. You’ll remember from the Enzymes chapter that in human biochemistry, thousands of enzymes are necessary for various essential cell reactions that take place every second we’re alive. (Howell) Without enzymes, we’d die instantaneously. Enzymes trigger specific reactions in the body. One way they do this is by having the exact shape necessary, like a key in a lock.
Fluoride Changes The Shape Of The Enzymes So That They No Longer Fit. Since enzymes are proteins, once they’ve been changed, they’re now foreign-looking. The body now treats them as invaders, even though they’re part of that body. This is known as an autoimmune situation – the body attacks itself. Another way to look at it: enzymes are long-chain proteins held in certain shapes. Hydrogen bonds are the Velcro strips that hold the enzyme in a certain shape. Fluoride comes along and hydrolyzes the enzyme: cuts the Velcro strips away. The shape collapses. No more enzyme; now just a foreign protein.”
Only after researching and finding fluoride information like the above did this subject become one near-and-dear to not only to myself, but to my wife and children as well. MUCH more here:
[http://www.stopthethyroidmadness.com/fluoride-and-your-thyroid/](http://www.stopthethyroidmadness.com/fluoride-and-your-thyroid/)

Grizz
